name: FastGPT 总规范辅助补丁：测试JSON证据 + 未知错误 + 自检增强
intended_for: AI models / workflow JSON generators, not end users
source_priority: 源文件仍然是主规范：FastGPT_AI模型专用_工作流JSON生成总规范_整合版_2026-05-12.md/txt
本补丁只追加测试证据、未知错误兜底协议、自检增强规则、文件上传修正案例。
当补丁与源文件冲突时：优先以真实导出的测试 JSON 和最新补丁规则为准；仍不确定时要求最小复现。

tested_json_manifest.file: FastGPT_上传文件并总结内容_修正版_2026-05-12.json

file_upload_readFiles.rule: readFiles.fileUrlList must reference [[workflowStartNodeId, userFiles]], not userChatInput.
file_upload_readFiles.answer_output_recommendation: answerNode should use text interpolation {{$aiChat.answerText$}} or confirmed reference mode.

unknown_error_protocol.principle: Static self-check normal does not prove runtime success. Do not blindly rewrite JSON.
unknown_error_protocol.first_action: collect runtime evidence or create minimal reproduction
minimal_repro: code fixed SQL+database tool+answerNode for DB

self_check_extra: If workflowStart has no userFiles output, no node may reference [workflowStart,userFiles].
If readFiles is used, fileUrlList must be two-dimensional array and must point to userFiles.
If static self-check passes but runtime fails, classify as UNKNOWN_RUNTIME_ERROR and request evidence/minimal test.
Do not rewrite a whole workflow for unknown errors; change one suspected point at a time.
Resources such as model, datasetId, webhook URL, secret, DB connection, appModule.pluginId cannot be invented.
For answerNode, if using array reference, ensure the UI mode is reference; otherwise prefer text interpolation.
